overall_summary: Excellent lap — you are ahead of the reference. Current gap: 7.580s faster than reference. The biggest opportunity is Sector 3 (+300.620s), where 4.4 km/h is being left on the table through the corners. Executing these fixes could recover 2.68s — a completely different lap time.

priority_actions.issue: Apex speed is 64.8 km/h below reference (29.6 vs 94.4 km/h). Significant corner exit speed deficit.
priority_actions.instruction: You are braking 15m too early and shedding too much speed. Delay the brake point and commit to a later apex. Target 94 km/h through here — it is completely achievable.
priority_actions.evidence: Apex: 29.6 km/h vs 94.4 km/h reference (-64.8 km/h).

priority_actions.issue: Apex speed is 24.6 km/h below reference (40.9 vs 65.5 km/h). Significant corner exit speed deficit.
priority_actions.instruction: Carry more speed to the apex — target 66 km/h. Take a wider entry to enable a later apex and trust the exit. This corner is where straight-line speed is won or lost.
priority_actions.evidence: Apex: 40.9 km/h vs 65.5 km/h reference (-24.6 km/h).
